title: If error formula
excerpt:
Hello everyone, 
Do you know if we have a IF_ERROR formula or similar thing ? 
Thank you, 
Corentin

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

Do you know if we have a IF_ERROR formula or similar thing ?

Thank you,

Corentin

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@corentin.dalfarra

The short answer is no. It sure would be nice to have. Basically, you have to plan your way around not allowing errors to happen.

It can take some real creative approaches to do that sometimes. But I haven’t yet run into one yet that I couldn’t figure out.

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JCorrell

Thank you for the answer.

In fact I find it quite difficult to predict errors that could happen when you do not have encountered all situations. I hope there is a feature planned in the roadmap.

Have a nice day,

Corentin
